output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P58 wd:Q876852 ; wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  BIND(YEAR(?eventDate) AS ?year)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
